title: CSShardsEconomy
description: Lightweight plugin that adds a secondary Shards currency with GUI shop support for modern Minecraft servers.
body:
Advanced Secondary Currency System for Minecraft Servers

CSShardsEconomy is a powerful, lightweight, and performance-optimized Minecraft plugin that adds a fully independent secondary currency system called “Shards” to your server.
It is designed for modern servers that want a premium-style economy system without interfering with Vault, Essentials, or their primary economy.

This plugin is perfect for Survival, Lifesteal, Skyblock, Prison, AFK-based servers, SMPs, and RPG servers that want more control over rewards and premium purchases.


---

✨ What This Plugin Does

CSShardsEconomy gives your server:

A separate virtual currency (Shards)

Full control over player balances

A clean and stable system for GUI shops

Custom sound effects

Easy configuration

Smooth performance with no lag


This system runs completely independently and does not replace your main economy.


---

🔥 Core Features

💠 Secondary Currency System

Fully separate from Vault / Essentials economy

Safe & secure player data storage

No external databases required

Handles large servers without lag


🛒 GUI Shop System

Custom menu support

Open menus with custom commands

Fully editable items, lore, prices, and actions

Works great with AFK shops, VIP shops, and premium stores


🔊 Sound System

Success and failure sounds

Custom volume and pitch

Version-safe sound handling


🧩 Placeholder Support

You can show player shard balance anywhere using:

%csshards_balance%


---

🔌 Dependencies

✅ Required Dependencies

CSShardsEconomy does not require any external plugin to work.

It works standalone with:

Paper

Spigot

Purpur


✅ Optional / Soft Dependencies

These plugins are optional but recommended for full functionality:

Plugin	Why It’s Useful

PlaceholderAPI	To display shard balance on scoreboards, TAB, holograms, etc.
DeluxeMenus	If you want complex custom GUIs
Vault	Only if you want to integrate primary economy alongside shards


⚠️ Vault is not required for CSShardsEconomy, only optional.


---

🧾 Supported Versions

✅ Minecraft 1.8.x → 1.21+
✅ Java 8+ compatible


---

⚙ Default Configuration Features

The plugin comes with:

Default shard balance system

Sound toggles

Admin permissions

Debug mode for troubleshooting


Everything is editable through config.yml.


---

🎮 Best Use Cases

CSShardsEconomy is perfect for:

✔ AFK reward servers
✔ Lifesteal SMPs
✔ Skyblock servers
✔ Prison servers
✔ RPG servers
✔ Premium item shop servers


---

⚡ Performance

Extremely lightweight

No lag spikes

Asynchronous file saving

Optimized for high-player servers



---

🔐 Permissions

Permission	Access

csshards.admin	Gives full admin control over the plugin



---

📦 Installation

1. Download the plugin JAR


2. Drop it into your /plugins folder


3. Restart your server


4. Configure config.yml


5. Optional: Install PlaceholderAPI for better visuals




---

🧾 Plugin Information

Name: CSShardsEconomy

Category: Economy / Utility

Type: Secondary Currency Plugin

Made for: Performance-focused Minecraft servers

Database: File-based (no MySQL required)



---

🏁 Final Note

CSShardsEconomy is built to give your server a premium-level economy experience, without the complexity and lag of heavy database plugins.


---
